page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores from the Intel Xeon processor family running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 1.0 thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is disabled, providing dedicated execution resources per vCPU.

This instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include any local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance as a compute-heavy resource. The lack of hyperthreading and dedicated core allocation ensures predictable CPU execution, though the low memory-per-core ratio limits its utility for memory-intensive applications. This hardware profile is suitable for compute-bound workloads, batch processing, web serving, and distributed microservices that do not require local disk storage or high memory overhead.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz, with a configuration of 1.0 thread per core that disables hyperthreading to ensure dedicated execution resources. The instance provides 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for compute-heavy workloads, batch processing, and web serving where dedicated CPU execution is required but memory demands are moderate.
